name: Chroma_Downsampling
operator_description: Downsamples chrominance components during JPEG compression by averaging adjacent pixels. This module contains SIMD-optimized implementations for different subsampling ratios: h2v1 (horizontal 2:1, vertical 1:1) and h2v2 (horizontal 2:1, vertical 2:1). The downsampling process reduces the spatial resolution of chroma components to match JPEG's typical 4:2:2 or 4:2:0 subsampling schemes, improving compression efficiency while maintaining acceptable visual quality.
